arts.ttl: Man City's plan to cope without Rodri: Four players in line to replace his role, a change in formation... and could they recall Kalvin Phillips or return for Newcastle's Bruno Guimaraes?
arts.sum: Rodri is arguably City's most important player, dictating the tempo of the game week after week, but Guardiola must now find a different solution in the middle of the park.

arts.ttl: Man City 'draw up' January transfer plans following Rodri injury blow
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly targeting the acquisition of a holding midfielder ahead of the January transfer window following Rodri's serious knee injury.

arts.ttl: It's a tragedy the Premier League need a hacker convicted of blackmail to hold Man City to account
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: Consider the individual whose evidence is at the core of the Premier League's case, though, and it is hard to share in all this schadenfreude.

arts.ttl: Sam Allardyce praises Arsenal's use of 'dark arts' against Man City and recalls the time Liverpool reported him for using similar tactics with Bolton
arts.sum: Allardyce clearly approved of how Arteta's men stifled City's flow, having deployed similar tactics against some of the Premier League's biggest teams while in charge of Bolton in the 2000s.
